tool.name: file_read
tool.description: Read the contents of a file.

parameter.name: path
parameter.description: Path to the file to read.

parameter.name: max_lines
parameter.description: Maximum number of lines to read (default: 1000).

parameter.name: path
parameter.description: Path to the file to write.

parameter.name: content
parameter.description: Content to write to the file.

tool.name: directory_list
tool.description: List files and directories in a path.

tool.name: file_search
tool.description: Search for files matching a glob pattern.
